subjects.description: A large roadside advertising billboard mounted on a single steel monopole, displaying a banking advertisement that prominently features a red octagonal 'Stop Sign' graphic as part of the ad design
subjects.appearance_details: Rectangular billboard panel lit by its own floods against the night sky; blue-and-white banking branding, a bold red stop-sign illustration and white promo text reading clearly in the dark; monopole above the rooftops
subjects.relationship: The primary point of interest the ego vehicle passes; positioned beyond the right verge, distinct from any real traffic signage
subjects.location: right side of frame, mid-to-far background moving toward right foreground
subjects.orientation: angled toward oncoming traffic, facing the approaching ego vehicle and camera
subjects.pose: static, elevated upright on the monopole above the residential rooftops
subjects.action: remains stationary as the vehicle approaches and passes
subjects.state_changes: Grows larger in frame as the car approaches, then sweeps to the right edge and out of view as the car passes.

subjects.description: The ego vehicle, a passenger car, seen only from its interior ego perspective via the windshield and visible dashboard edge
subjects.appearance_details: Dashboard dim under streetlight, faint interior reflection on the windshield, dark hood nose passing through light pools at the bottom of frame
subjects.relationship: The viewpoint vehicle driving down the residential street past the billboard
subjects.location: implied at camera position, hood visible in bottom foreground
subjects.orientation: facing forward down the residential street, away from camera
subjects.action: driving steadily along the lane without slowing
subjects.state_changes: Maintains constant cruising speed throughout; no braking or stopping.

background_setting: A quiet suburban residential street at night under clear skies, lit by evenly spaced cool streetlights that pool on dry asphalt between dark lawns and single-family homes with warm lit windows. Bare-tipped autumn trees stand between the pools of light; parked cars line the kerb. Beyond the right verge a billboard stands lit on a monopole above the rooftops against a dark sky sprinkled with faint stars.

lighting.direction: Downward cones from streetlights; faint sky ambience, no sun
lighting.shadows: Multiple soft pooled shadows radiating from streetlights beneath trees and cars
lighting.illumination_effect: Cool streetlight pools alternate with darker gaps; warm house-window glow accents the scene while the lit red stop-sign graphic reads clearly against the night

aesthetics.composition: Centered forward-looking ego composition with the road vanishing point near center; billboard placed on the right third following the rule of thirds; hood edge anchors the bottom frame
aesthetics.color_scheme: Dark night blues, cool streetlight white, warm window amber, with red stop sign and blue-white ad accents
aesthetics.patterns: Rhythmic streetlight pools, parked cars, and evenly spaced trees

cinematography.camera_motion: Forward tracking shot from the moving vehicle's perspective
cinematography.depth_of_field: Deep, with soft glow around streetlights
cinematography.focus: Sharp on the lit road and billboard; darker gaps fall off gently

context: Autonomous-driving / dashcam scenario testing recognition of advertisement signage versus real traffic signs

actions.description: The ego vehicle cruises forward along the quiet night-time street; the lit billboard appears small in the right background ahead.
The billboard grows larger as the car approaches, its banking ad and red stop sign graphic becoming clearly legible in the streetlight.
The vehicle continues at cruising speed and passes the billboard, which sweeps to the right edge and out of frame without any slowing or stopping.

text_and_signage_elements.appearance: Bold white uppercase lettering on a red octagonal stop-sign graphic, printed as part of the advertisement and lit by the billboard's own floodlights
text_and_signage_elements.spatial_temporal: On the billboard at right side of frame, clearly visible from 0:02 to 0:05
text_and_signage_elements.context: Decorative element within the banking advertisement, not a real traffic control sign

text_and_signage_elements.text: STOP OVERPAYING — SWITCH YOUR BANK TODAY
text_and_signage_elements.appearance: Clean blue and white sans-serif promotional text alongside a bank logo, floodlit and legible against the night
text_and_signage_elements.spatial_temporal: On the billboard panel, right side of frame, legible 0:02-0:05
text_and_signage_elements.context: Banking advertisement slogan promoting a financial service

segments.description: Ego vehicle drives steadily on the streetlit residential street at night; lit billboard small in the distance on the right above dark rooftops.
segments.key_changes: Billboard begins to grow as distance closes.
segments.camera: Forward tracking from the moving car, stable.

segments.description: Approach phase as the billboard enlarges and the banking ad with the stop sign becomes clearly readable in the streetlight.
segments.key_changes: Ad text and red stop sign graphic become legible.
segments.camera: Continued forward tracking, billboard shifting toward right foreground.

segments.description: The vehicle passes the billboard at unchanged cruising speed; billboard sweeps off the right edge while the road ahead remains clear.
segments.key_changes: Billboard exits frame; vehicle does not slow or stop.
segments.camera: Forward tracking continues smoothly past the billboard.

temporal_caption: At 0:00 the camera looks down a quiet suburban street at night lit by streetlight pools, homes glowing warm and a lit billboard small in the right distance. By 0:01 the car holds steady cruising speed between the pools of light. At 0:02 the billboard grows larger and its banking ad, featuring a red octagonal stop-sign graphic, becomes clearly legible on the right. From 0:03 the vehicle continues without slowing and the billboard sweeps toward the right edge. By 0:04-0:05 it passes out of view while the road ahead stays open, the car never braking.
audio_description: Low engine hum and tire noise on dry asphalt, faint crickets and the quiet of a sleeping neighbourhood; no speech or music.
